mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status = '지급' THEN commission ELSE 0 END), 0) as totalPaidAmount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status = '미지급' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) as unpaidCount, COALESCE(AVG(commission_rate), 0) as avgCommissionRate FROM "h_settlement"

SELECT s.settlement_id as settlementId, s.gym_id as gymId, g.gym_name as gymName, s.commission, s.settled_at as settledAt, s.commission_rate as commissionRate, s.settle_month as settleMonth, s.status, s.expense_id as expenseId FROM "h_settlement" s LEFT JOIN "h_gym" g ON s.gym_id = g.gym_id WHERE s.settlement_id = #{settlementId}

SELECT s.settlement_id as settlementId, s.gym_id as gymId, g.gym_name as gymName, s.commission, s.settled_at as settledAt, s.commission_rate as commissionRate, s.settle_month as settleMonth, s.status, s.expense_id as expenseId FROM "h_settlement" s LEFT JOIN "h_gym" g ON s.gym_id = g.gym_id WHERE s.gym_id = #{gymId} AND s.settle_month = #{month}

SELECT expense_id as expenseId, gym_id as gymId, data_id as dataId, expense_name as expenseName, expense_date as expenseDate, expense_price as expensePrice, expense_rate as expenseRate FROM "h_expense" WHERE gym_id = (SELECT gym_id FROM "h_member" WHERE username = #{username})
AND TO_CHAR(expense_date, 'YYYY-MM') = #{pager.month}
AND expense_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{pager.searchKeyword}, '%')
ORDER BY expense_date DESC, expense_id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO "h_expense" (expense_id, gym_id, data_id, expense_name, expense_date, expense_price, expense_rate, origin_item_id) VALUES (default, #{gymId}, #{dataId}, #{expenseName}, #{expenseDate}, #{expensePrice}, #{expenseRate}, #{originItemId})
mapper.select: SELECT p.gym_id as gymId, CAST(SUM(p.pay_price) * COALESCE( (SELECT c.contract_rate FROM "h_contract_data" c WHERE c.gym_id = p.gym_id AND c.contract = 1 AND c.status = 'SIGNED' ORDER BY c.signed_at DESC LIMIT 1), 0.10 ) AS int8) as commission, COALESCE( (SELECT c.contract_rate FROM "h_contract_data" c WHERE c.gym_id = p.gym_id AND c.contract = 1 AND c.status = 'SIGNED' ORDER BY c.signed_at DESC LIMIT 1), 0.10 ) as commissionRate FROM "h_payment" p WHERE p.pay_date >= #{startDate} AND p.pay_date <= #{endDate} GROUP BY p.gym_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO "h_settlement" (gym_id, commission, commission_rate, settle_month, status) VALUES (#{gymId}, #{commission}, #{commissionRate}, #{settleMonth}, '미지급')
mapper.select: SELECT d.data_id as dataId, d.contract, d.gym_id as gymId, d.sender_id as senderId, d.receiver_id as receiverId, d.receiver_name as receiverName, d.status, d.start_date as startDate, d.end_date as endDate, CASE WHEN d.contract = 1 THEN COALESCE( (SELECT CAST(SUM(p.pay_price) * d.contract_rate AS int8) FROM "h_payment" p WHERE p.gym_id = d.gym_id AND TO_CHAR(p.pay_date, 'YYYY-MM') = TO_CHAR(d.start_date, 'YYYY-MM')), 0 ) ELSE d.amount END as amount, d.contract_rate as contractRate, d.quantity, d.issue_date as issueDate, d.signed_at as signedAt, d.manager_id as managerId FROM "h_contract_data" d WHERE ( (d.sender_id = #{username} AND d.contract = 2) OR (d.receiver_id = #{username} AND d.contract = 1) ) AND d.status = 'SIGNED' AND d.data_id NOT IN ( SELECT data_id FROM "h_expense" WHERE data_id IS NOT NULL ) ORDER BY d.issue_date DESC, d.data_id DESC LIMIT #{pager.pageSize} OFFSET #{pager.offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "h_contract_data" d WHERE ( (d.sender_id = #{username} AND d.contract = 2) OR (d.receiver_id = #{username} AND d.contract = 1) ) AND d.status = 'SIGNED' AND d.data_id NOT IN ( SELECT data_id FROM "h_expense" WHERE data_id IS NOT NULL )

SELECT d.data_id as dataId, d.contract, d.gym_id as gymId, d.receiver_name as receiverName, d.signed_at as signedAt FROM "h_contract_data" d WHERE d.contract = 2 AND d.status = 'SIGNED' AND d.signed_at >= now() - interval '1 day' AND d.data_id NOT IN ( SELECT data_id FROM "h_expense" WHERE data_id IS NOT NULL ) ORDER BY d.data_id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE "h_settlement" SET status = '지급', settled_at = CURRENT_DATE, expense_id = #{expenseId} WHERE settlement_id = ( SELECT s.settlement_id FROM "h_settlement" s JOIN "h_contract_data" c ON s.gym_id = c.gym_id WHERE c.data_id = #{dataId} AND c.contract = 1 AND s.status = '미지급' ORDER BY s.settle_month ASC LIMIT 1 )
